## Summary

- 

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Gameplay/code behavior
- [ ] Scene or asset change
- [ ] Test/tooling change

## Verification

- [ ] `pwsh -File scripts/check.ps1`
- [ ] Manual playtest or smoke test:
- [ ] Not run:

## Godot Safety

- [ ] No unrelated scene/resource rewrites
- [ ] No generated/editor-local files committed
- [ ] `project.godot` changes are intentional
- [ ] Autoload/input-map changes are documented

## Docs

- [ ] Spec updated or not needed
- [ ] `docs/current_tasks.md` updated if task state changed
- [ ] `docs/testing.md` updated if verification changed
- [ ] Decision record added if this changes architecture or workflow

## Notes

-
